name: Factory Automation Pipeline
description: End-to-end manufacturing process automation covering sensor ingestion, quality control checks, defect routing, and production reporting.
author: Murphy System

nodes.label: Sensor Data Ingest
nodes.description: Receives real-time telemetry from factory floor sensors via MQTT or HTTP.

nodes.label: Quality Control Agent
nodes.description: Analyzes sensor readings against tolerance thresholds and flags anomalies.

nodes.label: Defect Router
nodes.description: Routes items to rework, reject, or pass lanes based on QC agent output.

nodes.label: Rework Queue
nodes.description: Logs defective items and triggers rework workflow tickets.

nodes.label: Production Report
nodes.description: Aggregates pass/fail metrics and publishes shift summary to dashboard.
